webFetch.apiKey.label: Scrapling Fetch API Key
webFetch.apiKey.help: Reserved for optional Scrapling HTTP service auth. Phase 2 keeps the field for compatibility.

webFetch.baseUrl.label: Scrapling Fetch Base URL
webFetch.baseUrl.help: Override the base URL used by the Scrapling fetch client.

service.baseUrl.label: Scrapling Service Base URL
service.baseUrl.help: Base URL for the managed Scrapling Python/HTTP sidecar service.

service.command.label: Scrapling Service Command
service.command.help: Command used to launch the Scrapling Python service.

service.bootstrap.label: Managed Scrapling Bootstrap
service.bootstrap.help: Create and maintain a plugin-owned Python virtual environment before starting the sidecar.

service.bootstrapPackages.label: Managed Scrapling Packages
service.bootstrapPackages.help: Pinned Python packages installed into the managed Scrapling virtual environment.

service.startupTimeoutMs.label: Scrapling Service Startup Timeout
service.startupTimeoutMs.help: How long CrawClaw should wait for the Scrapling service to become ready.

service.fetchPath.label: Scrapling Service Fetch Path
service.fetchPath.help: HTTP path served by the Scrapling sidecar fetch endpoint.
